text:
Sea Fireflies (ウミテホタル, Umitehotaru) are a species of firefly that live near brackish water. They can be found in the Republic of Rokario. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 218 

Appearance

The Sea Fireflies look exactly the same as regular fireflies. 

Behavior

Living near brackish water, Sea Fireflies use pheromones to attract each other during their mating season. Some trees also produce tree-sap that mimics their pheromones to attract them. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Gon looked for the right kind of twig to attract them so he could give it to Palm during their date. The following day, he gave it to Palm as a bouquet of light. 

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the insects are named "seaside fireflies". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 94 (2011)
